name: Construction Audit Compliance v1
validator_instructions: Verify zoning, permitting, scope alignment, RSMeans cost consistency, contractor licensing, and safety compliance.
policy_rules: Confirm zoning and permitting requirements are addressed.
Validate cost estimates against RSMeans or comparable benchmarks.
Require documented contractor licensing and insurance coverage.
Flag missing environmental or safety compliance steps.

name: Insurance Audit Compliance v1
validator_instructions: Validate underwriting rationale, claims evidence, exclusions, and non-discrimination requirements.
policy_rules: Confirm claims decisions are supported by documented evidence.
Validate policy exclusions are cited when used.
Check for underwriting fairness and non-discrimination language.
Flag missing regulatory disclosures or policy references.

name: Finance Underwriting Compliance v1
validator_instructions: Verify KYC/AML checks, underwriting criteria, risk disclosures, and audit trail completeness.
policy_rules: Confirm KYC/AML checks are referenced where applicable.
Require underwriting criteria and risk scoring explanation.
Flag missing loan or bond disclosure summaries.
Ensure audit trail references for approvals.

name: Public Sector Compliance v1
validator_instructions: Validate procurement, eligibility, conflict of interest checks, and reporting obligations.
policy_rules: Confirm eligibility criteria are satisfied.
Check procurement steps are documented and transparent.
Flag conflicts of interest or missing disclosure statements.
Ensure reporting timelines and obligations are included.

name: Digital Asset Compliance v1
validator_instructions: Verify custody controls, chain-of-custody, transaction monitoring, and AML disclosures.
policy_rules: Confirm custody model and key management references.
Require chain-of-custody and transaction monitoring notes.
Flag missing AML or sanctions screening statements.
Require risk disclosures for volatility and counterparty exposure.

name: Real Estate Portfolio Compliance v1
validator_instructions: Validate appraisal methodology, valuation comps, and regulatory disclosures.
policy_rules: Require appraisal method and comp reference.
Flag missing valuation assumptions or cap rate rationale.
Check for disclosure of liens or encumbrances.
Ensure portfolio risk factors are documented.
